session.user: Run `make lint ty` from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the full output. This is the fail-fast phase checking linting and type checking.
session.assistant: I'll run the linting and type checking commands from the repository root.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run linting and type checking with make

session.tool_result: uv run ruff check All checks passed! uv run ty check All checks passed!
session.assistant:
**Result: PASS**
Both linting and type checking completed successfully:
- **ruff check**: All checks passed! - **ty check**: All checks passed!
The fail-fast phase indicates the codebase is clean with no linting violations or type errors.
